description: Online multiplayer games: MMO, MOBA, FPS, battle royale, co-op
bootstrap_note: Ad-hoc optionals (not in canonical registry — require user opt-in, bootstrap uses Step 2.7 research to generate node-specs): social-system-design (guild/friend/chat systems), live-ops-design (seasonal content/events/battle pass), hero-roster-design (champion ability roster — include for MOBAs and hero shooters). Canonical optional guidance: economy-design + tech-tree-design for RTS games (StarCraft/WarCraft style); level-design for MOBAs (map/lane design) and MMOs (dungeon/zone design)
